CREATE TABLE numbers (a FLOAT, b FLOAT);
CREATE TABLE results AS SELECT sql_mul(a, b) AS product FROM numbers;
SELECT product FROM results WHERE product > 0;
SELECT sql_mul((SELECT a FROM numbers WHERE a = 1.2), (SELECT b FROM numbers WHERE b = 5)) AS result;
SELECT sql_mul(a, b) AS result FROM numbers WHERE a > 0 AND b > 0;
SELECT sql_mul(a, (SELECT AVG(b) FROM numbers)) AS avg_result FROM numbers;
SELECT sql_mul(a, (SELECT MAX(m) FROM more_numbers)) AS final_product FROM numbers WHERE b < 10;
